compiled_state.title: Code-review operation + multi-reviewer aggregation
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
Add the second motivating op: review code over commits + tickets with
deterministic reviewer selection (the `select_reviewers` rule layer exists) and
multi-reviewer aggregation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `review_code`-style op assembles commit+ticket context deterministically
- [ ] Runs each selected reviewer as a pass; reuses the findings contract
- [ ] Aggregation: cluster -> consensus -> rank by severity x agreement
- [ ] Exposed over library/CLI/MCP; offline tests via FakeRunner

comments.body: Implemented review_code (library/CLI rebar review-code/gated MCP review_code): diff-centric but agentic, deterministic reviewer selection (select_code_reviewers: code-quality always + applies_to matches), each reviewer runs as a pass, results merged by aggregate_findings (cluster->consensus->rank; findings carry agreement+reviewers). Added a code-quality reviewer + a lightweight repo orientation (#6 basic; full tree-sitter/PageRank repo-map left as a future enhancement). Offline tests cover aggregation clustering/ranking, reviewer-selection rules, and end-to-end via FakeRunner.
comments.author: Claude
